title: Incredibly Roasted Saudi Arabian Eggplant Tagine
description: A romantic lacto-vegetarian dish featuring roasted eggplant in a rich vinaigrette dressing, poached to perfection in a wok. This Saudi Arabian inspired recipe is sure to delight your taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the eggplant cubes with olive oil, garlic, and ginger until they are evenly coated.
Spread the eggplant mixture in a single layer in a wok and roast in the oven for 30 minutes.
While the eggplant is roasting, whisk together the apple cider vinegar, honey, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
After the eggplant has roasted for 30 minutes, remove it from the oven and pour the vinaigrette dressing over the top.
Return the wok to the oven and continue to roast for an additional 15 minutes.
Remove the wok from the oven and top the eggplant with crumbled feta cheese.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted eggplant hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
